title: Date Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious stir fry made with sweet dates and indian spices.
instructions: Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the indian spices and stir for 1 minute.
Add the dates and stir for 2-3 minutes.
Add the buttery and stir until melted.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Cook for 10-12 minutes or until the dates are caramelized.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
Serve as a snack or side dish.
